name: Liberation of the Tangrene Sector
description: A multi-act campaign arc following a rebel cell as they dismantle Imperial control, confront a rising criminal syndicate, and face a rogue Imperial warlord in the Tangrene Sector. Features branching mission paths and escalating threats.

acts.name: Sparking the Flame
acts.description: The rebel cell gathers resources and intelligence before launching a decisive strike against the Imperial garrison.

acts.name: Shadow Syndicate
acts.description: With Imperial forces weakened, the Shadow Syndicate moves to fill the power vacuum. The rebel cell must dismantle this criminal empire before it enslaves the sector.

acts.name: The Fractured Alliance
acts.description: A rogue Imperial warlord has broken from the Empire and built a splinter faction with prototype war machines and defected rebel operatives. The rebel cell must destroy this new threat before Drayen's army overruns the sector.

branchingNotes: Act 1: After Mission 2 (The Listening Post), players choose between Mission 3a (The Weapons Cache - moderate, loot-focused) or Mission 3b (Ambush at Xylo Pass - hard, rescue-focused). Both lead to the Act 1 finale. Act 2: After Mission 2 (The Bounty Board), players choose between Mission 3a (Shadow Syndicate Warehouse - hard, raid) or Mission 3b (Trandoshan Hunting Grounds - hard, survival). Both lead to the Act 2 finale: The Broker's Throne. Act 3: After Mission 2 (The Prototype Factory), players choose between Mission 3a (Assault on the Stronghold - hard, destroy droid reserves) or Mission 3b (The Betrayal - hard, confront rebel turncoats). Both lead to the Act 3 finale: Fortress Drayen.

rival.name: Vex Torrin
rival.description: A Devaronian bounty hunter with a reputation for ruthless efficiency. Vex operates in the same circles as your crew, competing for the same marks and contacts. In Act 1 he is a nuisance; by Act 3 he has become a serious threat to your operations.

act1.name: The Deserter
act1.description: Lt. Korvin Harsk, an Imperial logistics officer who went AWOL with classified supply manifests. The Alliance wants him alive for the data he carries.

act1.name: Rogue Probe Droid
act1.description: An Imperial Viper probe droid that went haywire and is broadcasting Alliance positions. Destroy it before it transmits to the sector fleet.

act1.name: The Spice Runner
act1.description: Tano Kree runs glitterstim through the Tangrene sector. Local resistance wants him gone, but alive -- he knows Syndicate supply routes.

act2.name: The Enforcer
act2.description: Grask, a Trandoshan enforcer for the Shadow Syndicate. His elimination would destabilize Syndicate operations in the mid-rim.

act2.name: The Data Broker
act2.description: An anonymous slicer selling Imperial comm codes on the black market. Capture and interrogate to learn the Syndicate's communication network.

bonusReward.description: Obtained Syndicate communication codes -- all Act 3 scout missions gain +1 bonus die.

act2.name: The Turncoat
act2.description: A former Alliance pilot who defected to the Syndicate with stolen starfighter schematics. The Alliance wants him silenced.

act3.name: The Warlord's Hand
act3.description: Commander Voss Drayen's personal enforcer and second-in-command. Eliminating her would throw Drayen's command structure into chaos before the final assault.

act3.name: The Architect
act3.description: The Geonosian engineer who designed Drayen's prototype war droids. Capturing him would yield technical data to exploit weaknesses in the droid army.

bonusReward.description: Obtained war droid schematics -- all heroes deal +1 damage to droid enemies in the finale.

act3.name: The Double Agent
act3.description: An Alliance operative suspected of feeding information to Drayen. Interrogate to confirm and extract the intelligence leak.
